notes.description: Pets are unlocked when you have enough gems ( ) to buy them at the Shop sales. Pets are equipment that provides a chance to assist the player in combat. Most pets can be purchased at the Shop and the Guild Shop. Several pets were distributed exclusively in events, and can't be purchased. There...
notes.craftable: As of April 30, 2020, players are able to craft mythic pets.
notes.event: Event pets listed on the archived page cannot be reforged.
